title: Vasudevanallur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Vasudevanallur with a Z-Score of +4.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Vasudevanallur is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The temperature is unusually high, with a CDD of 13.5 GG, and humidity is at 48%. 
 The wind speed is low, at 1.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
